content.en:
The replicator beast passed through the door and pretended to ask for help, while Ye Tian's body quickly left the forbidden land of the sea and sky.

Although he felt that the strength of the Haitian Holy Sect was not strong, what if the information was wrong?

Therefore, he had to be careful.

......

Haitian Holy Sect, station.

When Ye Tian's copy body passed through the door at the cost of being seriously injured and dying, he was immediately discovered by the Sea and Sky Holy Sect Alien Beast guarding at the other end of the door.

"There's an Ancestor Invasion!"

Ye Tian immediately called.

"What's going on?"

A powerful beast appeared and asked Ye Tian for information.

At the same time, some strange beasts gave Ye Tian some special healing things and life-saving things to Ye Tian, so as not to fall Ye Tian.

Ye Tian reported the situation truthfully, saying that there was a powerful ancestor who had invaded, which was comparable to the strongest ancestor, they were not opponents at all, and almost all of them were killed.

He escaped at great cost.

Immediately, a strange beast comparable to the strongest ancestor appeared and passed by in person.

And Ye Tian returned to the Haitian Holy Sect to heal his injuries, and the Haitian Holy Sect did not suspect him at all, and even this piece of heaven and earth recognized him and did not erase him.

Moreover, all the strange beasts in the forbidden land of the sea and sky have fallen, and he will hardly be discovered.

It can be said that Ye Tian's plan is complete.

---------------------

Haitian Holy Sect.

Ye Tian has been back for a while, and he still has a few servants, after all, as a powerful beast comparable to the top ancestor, his status in the Haitian Holy Sect is naturally very high.

And during this time, he asked about the recent situation through his servants, after all, he has been guarding the forbidden land of the sea and the sky, and he doesn't know the situation here, so it's okay to ask.

By inquiring about the scriptures of the Haitian Holy Sect, he gradually learned about this holy place.

This side of the world is not dominated by the Haitian Holy Sect, but has three major Holy Sects, among which the Haitian Holy Sect is the weakest.

Alien beasts comparable to the ancestors are called holy beasts here, and holy beasts are divided into ordinary holy beasts, elite holy beasts, top holy beasts, and supreme holy beasts.

The Sea and Sky Holy Sect has two Supreme Sacred Beasts, and the entire Heaven and Earth has ten Supreme Sacred Beasts, which are naturally much stronger than the Dark Forbidden Domain.

And there are even more top-level holy beasts, and the Haitian Holy Sect alone has more than seventy.

The Sea and Sky Holy Sect had a total of thousands of Holy Beasts, which was equivalent to thousands of Ancestors.

From this, it can be seen how powerful the Sea and Sky Holy Sect is, and the entire Dark Forbidden Domain combined cannot compete with a single Sea and Sky Holy Sect.

And the Haitian Holy Sect is still a relatively weak force, far inferior to the Bone Clan.

Ye Tian had now infiltrated this side of the Haitian Holy Sect, which they also called the Holy Domain.

The Sanctuary is infinite, and except for the Holy Beast, ordinary beings can't cross the entire Sanctuary at all, which is similar to the situation in the Dark Forbidden Domain.

Ye Tian currently has two goals.

The first goal is to seek a breakthrough and step into the realm of the Supreme Ancestor.

The second goal is to obtain the method of establishing the gate, although the Haitian Holy Sect is weak, but he also has mastered a gate, and he also wants to master the method of establishing the gate, so that the gate can exist forever.

"Complete the first goal first, after the first goal is completed, it will be easy to complete the second goal!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After all, the door is the most important thing of the Haitian Holy Sect, and the method of establishment must be in the hands of those two supreme holy beasts, and it is difficult to get it.

Ye Tian now only knew that by entering the other world, he could break the confinement of the top ancestor and thus advance to the realm of the strongest ancestor.

But how to break through, Ye Tian is still unclear.

It stands to reason that the top holy beasts of the Sea and Sky Holy Sect should know.

But Ye Tian was a fake top holy beast, and he didn't have the memory of that top holy beast.

He was not in a hurry to learn about this information at first, but continued to recuperate from his injuries and understand the situation at the same time.

During this period, a sacred beast came to pay a condolence visit.

Of course, he almost lost the Haitian Forbidden Land, and the punishment of the Haitian Holy Land also arrived, deducting several of his offerings for the Holy Beast Year.

The Year of the Holy Beast is equivalent to the Dark Calendar, so this is also a relatively heavy punishment.

Hundreds of millions of years later, another batch of holy beasts settled in the Haitian Forbidden Land, in order to prevent the loss of the Haitian Forbidden Land, the top three top holy beasts of the Haitian Holy Sect guarded the Haitian Forbidden Land, and a supreme holy beast was on the edge of the door to retreat and cultivate, once something happened, it would descend on the Haitian Forbidden Land as soon as possible.

It can be seen that they attach great importance to the door and the forbidden land of the sea and the sky.

And as time passed, Ye Tian gradually understood some of the holy beasts of the Haitian Holy Sect, at least there would be no mistakes.

As he continued to understand, Ye Tian found that the Holy Domain was somewhat similar to the Dark Forbidden Domain, at least the creatures here had various talents, among which the Holy Beasts also had Holy Gifts.

It's just that this copy body does not contain the talent of copying, so there is no way to check the talent of other holy beasts, but from those holy beasts in the forbidden land of the sea and sky, Ye Tian can also see all the holy endowments, and one of them also has the ancestral endowment, that is, the body copied by Ye Tian.

However, these talents were of little use to Ye Tian.

After getting acquainted with the holy beasts of the Haitian Holy Sect, Ye Tian used the identity of this holy beast named He Yuan to communicate with other holy beasts frequently, and even showed some longing for the strongest holy beasts.

Through various ways, I discussed with other top holy beasts the words such as the strongest holy beast, the Dark Forbidden Tribulation, and the breakthrough, and gradually understood the secret of the breakthrough.

Just as Ye Tian guessed, the top holy beasts knew how to impact the supreme holy beasts.

So, he finally got the secret.

"I didn't expect it to be so difficult for a top-level holy beast to break through to the Supreme Holy Domain!"

Ye Tian muttered.

According to what he knew, if the top holy beast wanted to break through to the Supreme Holy Beast, it had to enter another world at the time of the Great Tribulation, comprehend the rules of the other heaven and earth, and wait for the rules to comprehend to a certain extent, and create a holy beast body, once the holy beast body was complete, the two holy beast bodies could break the shackles under the stimulation of the two holy beast bodies, and thus be promoted to the strongest holy beast, and the two holy beast bodies would also merge into one and turn into the strongest holy beast body.

And if you want to create your own holy beast body, it is already difficult, and if you want to cultivate it to the consummation realm, you must need enough resources, or the resources of another heaven and earth, which requires you to snatch countless resources to improve yourself.

And the impact of the Supreme Holy Beast also requires a huge amount of resources.

Because of this difficulty, the Haitian Holy Sect has only two supreme holy beasts so far.

"In this way, if the top ancestor wants to impact the supreme ancestor, he must comprehend the rules of another heaven and earth, so as to create an ancestor method that fits the other heaven and earth, condense the body of the ancestor, and then cultivate the body of the ancestor to the peak realm of the top ancestor, so as to break the shackles, fuse the bodies of the two ancestors, and step into the realm of the strongest ancestor!"

Ye Tianming enlightened.

It was too difficult for the other Ancestors to make such a breakthrough.

But for him, it doesn't seem to be difficult!
